expected_behavior: Distinguishes between intentional nullable fields (externalRating, supplierInfo) that reflect federation/external-resolution semantics and genuinely risky nullable fields (SupplierInfo.name, SupplierInfo.contactEmail) that may lack justification.
Does NOT flag Product.id, Product.name, Product.price, or the [Product!]! list as violations, because those are already correctly non-null.
Asks or notes that SupplierInfo.contactEmail and SupplierInfo.name being nullable warrants explicit justification, and explains the consequence if those fields are silently null in client code.
